headline: THE SIGNATURE THAT CLEARS YOUR IMPORTS
subheading: Understand the QP declaration, the GMP evidence behind it, and why importers cannot skip it.
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial composition evoking a Qualified Person's regulatory confirmation for pharmaceutical imports: a single elegant fountain pen poised above a pristine folded document, its nib catching the light at the precise moment of signing, rendered in soft shallow depth of field. Surrounding it, a delicate constellation of conceptual props floats in balanced arrangement: a translucent row of capped glass pharmaceutical vials, an interlocking chain of fine audit-checklist motifs dissolving into light, and a faint geometric world-map lattice with luminous arcing routes suggesting cross-border supply chains converging on the signature point. Layered glass panels and brushed-metal surfaces imply oversight, verification and structured assurance. Deep navy backdrop with cool teal and cyan light washes, accented by a single fresh-green glow from a status indicator marking approval. Clean clinical-luxury mood, premium sterile precision, soft directional daylight raking across glass and paper, gentle reflections, uncluttered editorial framing. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
